params.title: Component parameters
params.description: Parameters of the GUIButton component class - 'name' (required), 'text', 'x', 'y', 'width', 'height' (optional).

name.title: Button Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this button, used to match UI events.
name.markdownDescription: Unique identifier for this button, used to match UI events.

text.title: Button Label
text.description: Text displayed on the button. Defaults to the component object repr if omitted.

x.title: X Position
x.description: X position of the button in pixels. Default is 0.

y.title: Y Position
y.description: Y position of the button in pixels. Default is 0.

width.title: Width
width.description: Width of the button in pixels. Default is 100.

height.title: Height
height.description: Height of the button in pixels. Default is 100.
